item.title: Spark Execution Plan
item.author: seilylook
item.description: Execution plan goal An execution plan is the set of operations executed to translate a query language statement (SQL, Spark SQL, Dataframe operations etc.) to a set of optimized logical and physical operations. Execution plan is a set of operations that will be executed from the SQL(or Spark SQL) statement to the DAG which will be send to Spark Executors. Info DAG? Directed Acyclic Graph. A DAG is an acyclic graph produced by the DAG scheduler in Spark.
